brand.name: BeiLuo
brand.slogan: Top 8 Electronic Component Distributor in China
brand.oneLiner: Infineon authorized distributor since 2013 — Top 8 in China, with 10,000+ Infineon part numbers in Shenzhen bonded-warehouse stock.

links.label: Leading Infineon distributor connecting innovation with reliability across global markets.

globalNetwork.intro: Our commitment to providing exceptional service and local support is reflected in our extensive global sales network. From our headquarters in Shandong to major economic centers across Asia, Europe, and the Americas, the BeiLuo team is strategically positioned to meet your needs. Find your nearest office below.
